text:
The Net Police (, Netto Porisu) is a cyber police force. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 69 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

When Killua asks him about obtaining information on Greed Island, Milluki suggests the Hunter Website. He then explains that while he could hack into the site, he doesn't want to draw attention from the Net Police and Hacker Hunters. 

Trivia

The Net Police is not mentioned in either of the anime adaptations.
